    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b6 on table, b7 on b6

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 2
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 2
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 5
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 6: height 6
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm state
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top, b3 on table
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top, b5 on table
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on top, b7 on table
      (on-table b7)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b8 on top, b12 on table
      (on-table b12)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (clear b8)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b13 on top, b18 on table
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (clear b13)
      
      ;; Arm empty at end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

      (on b13 b14)

      ;; Arm empty at end
